case.rationale: This session's project memory + filesystem markdown both contain the phrase. Tests basic RRF fusion across two sources.
Class symbol indexed by gitnexus (label=Class on memu.ts). filesystem can grep the source file. claudemem unlikely.
case.preconditions: gitnexus adapter must be configured with repos=["obsidian-llm-wiki"]

case.rationale: okaoi appears in feedback_okaoi_worker_layer.md (claudemem), memU chat history mentions, filesystem 04-Research notes.

This phrase only exists as a memorix observation (sess-mndj1lcs-r78gh7, 2026-03-30 codex shell environment policy change). NOT in any claudemem .md (verified 2026-04-29: grep -i "shell.*env.*inherit" against ~/.claude/.../memory/ returns 0 hits). Tests router's ability to surface info from the only adapter that has it. Pre-2026-04-29 expected-sources was incorrectly "claudemem" -- corrected after Phase 4 eval surfaced the placement asymmetry.
Persona constitution (CLAUDE.md). Tests rare term recall against literal substring match.
project_gitnexus_stable_ops.md (claudemem) + this session's project memory references.

case.intent: Chinese long query -- ILIKE limitation test
case.rationale: The exact phrase appears verbatim in this project memory file. ILIKE substring match should find it. If 0 hits, confirms hypothesis that long Chinese queries fail under literal substring (motivates vector search wiring task #4).
case.fail-tolerance: FLAG-not-FAIL if 0 hits -- known limitation, not adapter bug

case.rationale: Random gibberish should return zero hits across all adapters. Tests that adapters don't fabricate matches.
The new adapter referenced in source code (gitnexus Class), project memories (claudemem), and filesystem markdown.
Added to project_memory_router_extension.md this session. Tests freshness of new memory in claudemem cache (requires restart to re-index).
